quests.title: The Mystic Beginning
quests.description: High Seeker Elara has accepted you into the Arcanum Seekers. Begin your initiation by harvesting energy fragments from Wild Mushrooms on the Crystal Slope. Knowledge is Power.

objectives.description: Defeat Wild Mushrooms and extract their mystic energy.
Collect Mystic Fragments from the energy-rich crystals.

quests.title: Crystal Sentience
quests.description: Crystal Sproutlings possess a primitive sentience. Study them up close — through combat if necessary. The Arcanum must understand all forms of consciousness.

quests.title: Shardling Analysis
quests.description: Shardlings are fragments of a larger crystalline consciousness. Collect enough specimens for the Arcanum's living archive.

objectives.description: Capture Shardling fragments for the archive.
Extract Shardling cores for crystallographic study.

quests.title: Wisp Whispers
quests.description: Crystal Wisps are pure energy manifestations. Their whispers are believed to contain fragments of Precursor language. Capture their energy signature.

objectives.description: Contain Crystal Wisps for energy analysis.

quests.title: The First Awakening
quests.description: You have shown great promise. Archsage Myr summons you to the Observatory Spire to choose your path of arcane specialization.

objectives.description: Speak with Archsage Myr at the Observatory Spire.
Demonstrate your arcane potential against Crystal Sprites.

quests.title: Secrets of the Quarter
quests.description: The Fractured Glass Valley holds relics from a shattered Precursor research station. Arcanum Seeker scholars believe ancient data slates are buried here.

objectives.description: Recover ancient data slates from the ruins.

quests.title: Glass Walker
quests.description: Glass Crawlers navigate the valley's razor-sharp terrain with ease. Study their movement patterns — they may hold the key to safe traversal.

objectives.description: Neutralize Glass Crawlers and record movement patterns.

quests.title: Alpha Rat Infestation
quests.description: A Giant Alpha Rat has claimed the valley's central archive chamber. Clear it out — the knowledge stored inside is priceless.

objectives.description: Defeat the Giant Alpha Rat in the archive chamber.
Recover archive scrolls from the chamber.

quests.title: Glass Wisp Extraction
quests.description: Glass Wisps are an evolved form of Crystal Wisps, their energy signatures far more complex. Contain them for the Arcanum's energy archive.

quests.title: Crystal Ram Charge
quests.description: Crystal Rams guard the valley's deepest ravine. Their crystalline horns resonate with raw Aethel energy. Harvest them for the Arcanum.

objectives.description: Defeat Crystal Rams in the deep ravine.

quests.title: Cradle Observations
quests.description: The Resonance Caverns emit frequencies matching Precursor communication protocols. Arcanum believes these caverns hold the key to ancient technology.

objectives.description: Record resonance frequencies from the caverns.

quests.title: Bat Frequencies
quests.description: Resonance Bats emit sonic pulses that disrupt arcane equipment. Nullify them and collect their frequency patterns.

objectives.description: Defeat Resonance Bats in the caverns.

quests.title: Golem Guardians
quests.description: Resonance Golems are Precursor guardians powered by sound harmonics. Their construction is millennia ahead of anything the Arcanum has seen.

quests.title: Echo Math
quests.description: The cavern walls echo with mathematical precision. Record the echo patterns — they may be a Precursor mathematical proof frozen in sound.

objectives.description: Clear Bats from the echo chambers.

quests.title: Harmonic Interference
quests.description: Interference patterns in the cavern harmonics indicate hostile entities disrupting the Precursor signal. Locate and eliminate the source.

objectives.description: Eliminate Bat swarms amplifying the interference.

quests.title: Cavern Cartography
quests.description: Map the unexplored sections of the Resonance Caverns. The Arcanum believes there are sealed chambers containing Precursor artifacts.

quests.title: Sealed Chamber
quests.description: The cartography reveals a sealed Precursor chamber. Breach it and document everything inside before the resonance destabilizes the entrance.

objectives.description: Recover artifacts from the sealed chamber.

quests.title: Echoes of the Precursors
quests.description: The artifacts contain Precursor language fragments. High Seeker Elara wants them translated immediately. Protect the translation ritual.

objectives.description: Defend the translation site from Golem assault.

quests.title: The Resonance Trial
quests.description: The Resonance Echo — a concentrated manifestation of Precursor data — has formed in the deepest chamber. Defeat it and secure its energy data for the Arcanum's eternal archive.

quests.title: Seeker's Trial
quests.description: You have proven your worth as a true Arcanum Seeker. Return to the Observatory Spire for your Advanced Class evaluation and access to restricted archives.

objectives.description: Receive your Advanced Seeker Badge from High Seeker Elara.

quests.title: Forbidden Zones
quests.description: The Shard Pulse Peak is a forbidden research zone. Ancient machines still operate there, pulsing with unknowable energy. The Arcanum has authorized your entry.

objectives.description: Ascend to the Shard Pulse Peak.
Take energy readings from the ancient machines.

quests.title: Sentinel Disruption
quests.description: Shard Pulse Sentinels patrol the peak's machine platforms. Their energy signatures suggest they are guardians of dormant technology.

objectives.description: Disable Shard Pulse Sentinels for analysis.

quests.title: Guardian Protocols
quests.description: Shard Pulse Guardians are elite Sentinel variants. They protect the peak's central machine. Disable them and access the machine's data terminal.

quests.title: Leviathan's Depth
quests.description: A Sunken Aethel Leviathan has been detected in the peak's subterranean lake. Its biology may hold secrets of Aethel conversion. Capture tissue samples.

quests.title: Tyrant's Pulse
quests.description: The Shard Pulse Tyrant is the apex guardian of the peak. Its energy signature matches Precursor command protocols. Disable it to access the master terminal.

quests.title: Storm Serpent
quests.description: A Storm Rift Serpent has been drawn to the peak's energy. These creatures ride electromagnetic currents. Harvest its scales for the Arcanum's armory.

quests.title: Celestial Observation
quests.description: The Aethel Storm Belt is a contested zone of intense electromagnetic activity. The Arcanum seeks to establish an observation post to study celestial phenomena.

quests.title: Storm Wranglers
quests.description: Storm Rift Serpents dominate the Storm Belt. Their electromagnetic nature disrupts our instruments. Thin their population.

objectives.description: Defeat Storm Rift Serpents in the Belt.

quests.title: Leviathan Hunt
quests.description: Multiple Sunken Aethel Leviathans have migrated into the Storm Belt. Their migration pattern is unprecedented — and dangerous to the observation post.

objectives.description: Defeat Leviathans threatening the observation post.

quests.title: The Second Ascension
quests.description: Archsage Myr has determined you are ready for Ascension. Return to the Observatory Spire for the arcane elevation ritual.

objectives.description: Report to Archsage Myr for Ascension evaluation.
Defeat the Resonance Echo to prove your arcane growth.
Defeat a Shard Pulse Tyrant as your advanced trial.

quests.title: Orbital Ambitions
quests.description: The Arcanum Seekers require access to orbital platforms. Knowledge of the heavens is the next frontier. Establish our presence at the Orbital Sentinel Command.

quests.title: Celestial Hunt
quests.description: The Ashen Drake has been sighted from orbit. The Arcanum needs direct observation data. Track the Drake in the Cradle Expanse.

objectives.description: Engage and observe the Ashen Drake. Survival is sufficient.

quests.title: Behemoth Study
quests.description: Aethel Behemoths possess unusual regenerative properties. The Arcanum believes their biology can unlock new alchemical formulas.

objectives.description: Defeat Aethel Behemoths for tissue samples.

quests.title: Void Alchemy
quests.description: Aethel Void Channelers are conducting void-alchemical rituals. Steal their research — it may contain the key to void energy transmutation.

quests.title: Abyssal Specimen
quests.description: Aethel Abyssal Reavers are creatures of pure void energy. The Arcanum requires a live essence sample for the restricted archive.

objectives.description: Defeat Abyssal Reavers and extract essence.
Contain a pure Abyssal Essence sample.

quests.title: Archive Defense
quests.description: Rival factions are probing Arcanum orbital archives. The knowledge stored here must be protected at all costs.

objectives.description: Repel intruders from the orbital archives.

quests.title: Drake's Alchemy
quests.description: The Ashen Drake's fire contains unique alchemical properties. The Arcanum must obtain a fresh flame sample — directly from the source if necessary.

objectives.description: Confront the Ashen Drake for a flame sample.

quests.title: Corrupted Research
quests.description: Aethel Corrupted Behemoths are the result of failed void experiments by rival factions. Clean up their mess and collect the corrupted data.

quests.title: Abyssal Raid
quests.description: Multiple Abyssal Reavers threaten to overrun the orbital research stations. The Arcanum cannot afford to lose decades of orbital data.

quests.title: Master of the Arcane
quests.description: The final trial for Master rank. Defeat the Ashen Drake and two elite guardians to gain access to the Arcanum's most restricted orbital archives.

quests.title: Echoes of the Past
quests.description: The Void Echo Chasm contains echoes of all knowledge ever lost. The Arcanum Seeker's greatest ambition: enter the chasm and retrieve what was forgotten.

objectives.description: Extract Lost Knowledge Echoes from the chasm.

quests.title: Void Reaver Research
quests.description: Void Reavers are the most stable void entities. Study them extensively — their nature may reveal how to safely harness void energy.

objectives.description: Complete the Void Reaver research catalog.

quests.title: Forbidden Rituals
quests.description: Ancient void rituals have been detected in the chasm depths. The energy signatures match the Abyss Harbinger myth. Investigate with extreme caution.

quests.title: Abyssal Harvest
quests.description: Abyssal Reavers contain concentrated void essence — the most potent alchemical ingredient known. Harvest them for the Arcanum's grand experiment.

objectives.description: Harvest Abyssal Reavers for void essence.

quests.title: Behemoth Experiment
quests.description: Aethel Corrupted Behemoths in the chasm show signs of controlled mutation. The Arcanum hypothesizes they were someone's experiment. Collect tissue for comparative analysis.

objectives.description: Defeat Corrupted Behemoths for tissue samples.
Extract mutation data from their cores.

quests.title: Fragmented Souls
quests.description: Soul Fragmenters tear apart the boundary between consciousness and void. The Arcanum believes studying them could unlock the secrets of consciousness itself.

objectives.description: Defeat Soul Fragmenters for consciousness study.

quests.title: Chrono Anomaly
quests.description: Chrono Wraiths warp time around them. If the Arcanum can understand their temporal mechanics, the implications for knowledge preservation are infinite.

objectives.description: Defeat Chrono Wraiths for temporal research.

quests.title: Jotunn Biology
quests.description: Gigantic Jotunns are biological impossibilities. Their existence defies known science. The Arcanum must study one up close.

objectives.description: Defeat a Gigantic Jotunn for biological study.
Extract biological samples from the Jotunn.

quests.title: Heart of Knowledge
quests.description: The Shattered Heart is the ultimate repository of Precursor knowledge. The Arcanum has waited centuries for this moment. Enter and claim what is ours.

quests.title: Siphoning the Drake
quests.description: The Ashen Drake's heart contains the secret of eternal fire — the ultimate alchemical catalyst. The Arcanum demands it. Raid Tier-1: claim the Drake's heart for the grand experiment.

objectives.description: Defeat the Ashen Drake in its lair.
Clear Drake Minions from the lair.

quests.title: Fragmented Reality
quests.description: Soul Fragmenters are multiplying across the chasm. Each one tears a hole in the fabric of consciousness. The Arcanum must contain them to prevent a reality cascade.

objectives.description: Deploy reality anchors at the rift points.

quests.title: Void Dominance
quests.description: The Arcanum initiates Operation Void Dominance. All void signatures must be catalogued, contained, or eliminated. Knowledge of the void must be total.

quests.title: Stalker of Secrets
quests.description: A Void Stalker has been hunting Arcanum researchers. It seems to be drawn to those who carry Precursor knowledge. Turn the hunt around.

objectives.description: Track and defeat the Void Stalker.
Recover the knowledge cache from the Stalker's victims.

quests.title: Temporal Paradox
quests.description: Chrono Wraiths are creating temporal loops within the chasm. Each loop traps a piece of Precursor knowledge in an endless cycle. Break the loops.

objectives.description: Banish Chrono Wraiths from the temporal loops.
Recover knowledge fragments from broken loops.

quests.title: Reaver Overflow
quests.description: Abyssal Reavers flood from the Shattered Heart. Each one carries traces of Precursor data. The Arcanum must collect them all.

objectives.description: Defeat Abyssal Reavers and extract data traces.
Compile the collected Precursor data traces.

quests.title: Jotunn Archive Guardians
quests.description: Gigantic Jotunns in the Shattered Heart are not random — they guard something. The Arcanum believes a Precursor archive lies beneath their territory.

objectives.description: Triangulate the archive location from defeated guardians.

quests.title: Tyrant Archive
quests.description: Crystal Tyrants have claimed the Precursor archive as their territory. Their crystalline bodies have absorbed millennia of stored knowledge.

objectives.description: Defeat Crystal Tyrants at the Precursor archive.
Extract absorbed knowledge from a Tyrant crystal.

quests.title: The Harbinger's Formula
quests.description: The Abyss Harbinger is not just a monster — it is a living formula. An equation of pure void given form. The Arcanum must record it before destroying it.

objectives.description: Defeat a Chrono Wraith to access the sanctum.
Record the Harbinger Formula from the sanctum walls.

quests.title: Soul Harvest
quests.description: Soul Fragmenters are harvesting the souls of fallen researchers. The Arcanum cannot allow the accumulated knowledge of its members to be consumed.

objectives.description: Destroy Soul Fragmenters to free trapped souls.
Eliminate the Void Stalker directing the Fragmenters.

quests.title: The Harbinger's Secret
quests.description: THE ULTIMATE KNOWLEDGE TRIAL. The Abyss Harbinger is a dimensional library — a living archive of forbidden knowledge. Defeat the Raid Boss Tier-2 entity and claim every secret it holds. Knowledge is Power. Secrets are Sovereignty.

quests.title: Seismic Research
quests.description: The Harbinger's defeat has triggered unprecedented seismic activity. The Arcanum sees opportunity: tectonic data may reveal the planet's deepest secrets.

objectives.description: Collect deep seismic readings from the fault.

quests.title: Tectonic Scanning
quests.description: Aethel Iron Carapaces are drawn to the fault's energy. Their shells contain compressed geological data spanning millions of years.

objectives.description: Defeat Iron Carapaces for geological data.

quests.title: Tyrant Seismic
quests.description: Crystal Tyrants at the fault emit resonant frequencies that amplify seismic waves. The Arcanum hypothesizes they can be used as planetary-scale transmitters.

objectives.description: Defeat Crystal Tyrants for resonance study.

quests.title: Jotunn Migration
quests.description: Gigantic Jotunns are migrating through the faultline. Their movement patterns correlate with Precursor navigation charts discovered in the Harbinger's archives.

objectives.description: Map Jotunn migration against Precursor charts.

quests.title: The Siphon Laboratory
quests.description: The Aethel Siphon Core is the ultimate Precursor laboratory. The Arcanum has theorized its existence for centuries. Now it is discovered — claim it for science.

objectives.description: Download laboratory data from Siphon terminals.

quests.title: Core Specimens
quests.description: Abyssal Reavers in the Core have been mutated by concentrated Aethel. These mutations are scientifically invaluable.

quests.title: Behemoth Siege
quests.description: Corrupted Behemoths assault the Core's primary conduits. If the Core falls, the greatest Precursor laboratory is lost forever.

objectives.description: Defeat Corrupted Behemoths at the conduits.
Backup critical conduit data before destruction.

quests.title: Rift Research
quests.description: Aethel Rift Stalkers create micro-rifts that offer glimpses into alternate dimensions. The Arcanum must study these windows into other realities.

objectives.description: Defeat Rift Stalkers near active micro-rifts.

quests.title: Titan's Formula
quests.description: The Gravity Titan's existence is a mathematical anomaly. The Arcanum believes understanding its formula could revolutionize gravitational science.

objectives.description: Collect Titan Formula data from seismic stations.
Defeat a Jotunn drawn by Titan resonance.

quests.title: The Titan's Core
quests.description: THE GRAVITATIONAL TRIAL. The Gravity Titan has risen. Its core is the most valuable scientific specimen in Xylos history. The Arcanum demands you retrieve it — intact. Defeat the Raid Boss Tier-3 entity and claim the Titan's gravitational heart for the eternal archives.

objectives.description: Extract the intact Titan Gravity Core.

quests.title: The Great Forge
quests.description: The Prima Materia Forge — the Precursor facility where reality itself can be shaped. The Arcanum's ultimate ambition: master the Forge and create legendary weapons.

objectives.description: Download Forge schematics for the Arcanum.

quests.title: Forge Defenses
quests.description: Ancient Forge Automatons still defend the facility. Disable them and reverse-engineer their construction — the Arcanum could replicate this technology.

quests.title: Forge Purification
quests.description: Corrupted Behemoths contaminate the Forge's raw materials. The purity of Prima Materia must be absolute for legendary crafting.

objectives.description: Purge Corrupted Behemoths from the Forge.
Collect Purified Materia from secured chambers.

quests.title: Abyssal Contamination
quests.description: Void Channelers seek to corrupt the Forge. Void-tainted Prima Materia would be catastrophic. Stop them at all costs.

objectives.description: Silence Void Channelers at the Forge core.

quests.title: Jotunn Forge-Masters
quests.description: Gigantic Jotunns have learned to use the Forge's heat as a weapon. Their mastery of the Forge's fire is concerning — and fascinating.

quests.title: Materia Synthesis
quests.description: The Arcanum initiates Operation Materia Synthesis. The goal: produce the first Arcanum-crafted legendary weapon using Prima Materia.

objectives.description: Clear the Forge of hostile forces.

quests.title: Automaton Mastery
quests.description: Titan Forge Automatons are the apex of Precursor engineering. The Arcanum must learn to control them rather than simply destroy them.

quests.title: Proto-Core Experiment
quests.description: A Titan Proto Core contains a failed Titan — the ultimate experimental subject. The Arcanum must dissect it to understand Titan biology.

objectives.description: Destroy the Titan Proto Core for dissection.

quests.title: The Forge Complete
quests.description: The Forge is mastered. The legendary weapon is forged. But the final test remains: prove the weapon's worth against the two greatest threats to Xylos.

objectives.description: Test the legendary weapon against the Gravity Titan.
Prove the weapon's worth against the Abyss Harbinger.

quests.title: Legendary Seeker
quests.description: You have defeated both Titan and Harbinger in a single campaign. The Arcanum Seekers recognize you as a Legendary Seeker. Return to the Observatory Spire.

objectives.description: Receive the Legendary Seeker Medallion from High Seeker Elara.

quests.title: Apex Dominance
quests.description: The Hidden Aethelgardian City — a mythical Precursor metropolis. The Arcanum has triangulated its location using data from the Titan and Harbinger. Enter and claim its knowledge.

quests.title: City Defenses
quests.description: The city's automated defenses still function. They do not distinguish between friend and foe — only threats to Precursor knowledge.

quests.title: The Eternal Library
quests.description: The city contains the Eternal Library — a Precursor repository of all knowledge. Download its contents for the Arcanum's grand archive.

objectives.description: Defeat Reavers drawn to the knowledge energy.

quests.title: Apex Drake
quests.description: The Ashen Drake has evolved to its Apex form — a living repository of draconic knowledge. The Arcanum must study this ultimate form.

objectives.description: Collect an Apex Drake Scale for the archive.

quests.title: Apex Harbinger
quests.description: The Abyss Harbinger's rebirth brings new void-knowledge. The Arcanum must record its new form before destroying it forever.

objectives.description: Record the Apex Harbinger's new void formula.

quests.title: Apex Titan
quests.description: The Gravity Titan's third manifestation is its most powerful. Its gravitational signature contains data from the planet's formation. The Arcanum must have it.

objectives.description: Record the Titan's planetary formation data.

quests.title: Tri-Entity Research
quests.description: The three Apex entities — Drake, Titan, Harbinger — represent three branches of forbidden knowledge. The Arcanum authorizes their simultaneous study.

quests.title: The Siphon Overlord
quests.description: The Aethel Siphon Core is now the Arcanum's primary research facility. Establish total control and begin the planetary energy calibration.

objectives.description: Return to the Siphon Core as Overlord.

quests.title: World Engine Discovery
quests.description: Beneath the Siphon Core lies the World Engine — the device that can reshape planetary reality. The Arcanum's greatest discovery. Secure it absolutely.

quests.title: Knowledge Calibration
quests.description: The World Engine can be calibrated to broadcast knowledge across the planet. The Arcanum's ultimate dream: a world where all knowledge is shared. Protect the calibration.

objectives.description: Defend the World Engine from Abyssal assault.

quests.title: Jotunn Purge
quests.description: Residual hostile entities are being flushed by the World Engine. Begin the systematic purge at the Severance Faultline.

quests.title: Void Silence
quests.description: The Void is collapsing. The Arcanum must collect the final void data before it disappears forever. Every echo is precious.

objectives.description: Compile the final void data archive.

quests.title: Tyrant's Last Archive
quests.description: Crystal Tyrants in the Shattered Heart have absorbed the last remaining Precursor archives. Extract the knowledge from their crystalline bodies.

objectives.description: Extract the final archives from Tyrant crystals.

quests.title: Forge Completion
quests.description: The Forge will be the Arcanum's eternal workshop. Purify the last remaining contamination and seal the facility.

quests.title: Expanse Dominion
quests.description: The Cradle Expanse is now Arcanum research territory. Enforce our intellectual sovereignty with overwhelming arcane power.

objectives.description: Clear all hostiles from the Expanse.

quests.title: Eternal Vigil
quests.description: From orbit, the Arcanum watches over Xylos — the planet that is now our greatest library. Maintain eternal vigilance over our domain of knowledge.

quests.title: The Final Formula
quests.description: The collected knowledge from all sources forms the Final Formula — the unified theory of Xylos. Channel all accumulated Arcanum knowledge into its completion.

objectives.description: Defeat Jotunns resisting the Final Formula.
Channel knowledge into the Final Formula.

quests.title: The Final Convergence
quests.description: Only the ultimate test remains. Face the three Apex entities — Jotunn, Drake, and Harbinger — and from their essences forge the Key of Absolute Knowledge.

objectives.description: Forge the Key of Absolute Knowledge.

quests.title: Sovereign of Secrets
quests.description: The deepest Void Echo Chasm holds the final secret — the truth of Xylos's creation. Descend one final time and claim the ultimate knowledge.

objectives.description: Descend to the deepest chasm level.
Defeat the eternal form of Gravity Titan.
Destroy the eternal form of Abyss Harbinger.
CLAIM THE SOVEREIGN SEAL OF SECRETS.

quests.title: Eternity of Knowledge
quests.description: You have done the impossible. You hold the Sovereign Seal. Return to the Observatory Spire where all of the Arcanum Seekers await. You are no longer a Seeker. You are the SOVEREIGN OF SECRETS. Knowledge is Power. Secrets are Sovereignty. Now and forever.

objectives.description: Return to the Observatory Spire as the Sovereign of Secrets.
Receive the highest honors from High Seeker Elara.
